COMMENT=PRF fitting along the moving track with local background modeling.
COMMENT=JD are TESS BTJD (BJD_TDB) converted to approximate UTC (-69.184 s);
COMMENT=no asteroid light-time correction; barycentric-vs-geocentric offset
COMMENT=is <= ~500 s, negligible for the multi-hour periods reported.
COMMENT=Magnitudes are calibrated TESS-band (T) values on the TESS zero point;
COMMENT=T is a broad red band closest to Cousins I, reported as MAGBAND=I.
COMMENT=Quality cuts: mag err < 1.0 and iterated bright-side robust clip
COMMENT=(reject mag < median - 4*MAD) to remove background-star crossings.
COMMENT=Family: Beltwide. Adopted rotation period 12.262 h (2P),
COMMENT=house convention: amplitude-first (amp>0.40 mag) + asymmetry-override
COMMENT=doubling, adversarially verified against raw photometry. status=CONFIRMED.
COMMENT=Note: confirms Cellino+2024/DurechHanus2023 12.26h
COMMENT=OBJECTNAME defaults to the bare object number: no local provisional-
COMMENT=designation table was available for this family; verify/replace before
COMMENT=the manual alcdef.org upload if a proper designation is known.
COMMENT=Associated second MPB paper is in preparation (not yet submitted);
COMMENT=this export is prep-only.

COMMENT=TESS Sector 64 full-frame images; photometry extracted with
COMMENT=tess-asteroids v1.5.1 (Tuson et al. 2026, doi:10.5281/zenodo.19222134),
COMMENT=PRF fitting along the moving track with local background modeling.
COMMENT=JD are TESS BTJD (BJD_TDB) converted to approximate UTC (-69.184 s);
COMMENT=no asteroid light-time correction; barycentric-vs-geocentric offset
COMMENT=is <= ~500 s, negligible for the multi-hour periods reported.
COMMENT=Magnitudes are calibrated TESS-band (T) values on the TESS zero point;
COMMENT=T is a broad red band closest to Cousins I, reported as MAGBAND=I.
COMMENT=Quality cuts: mag err < 1.0 and iterated bright-side robust clip
COMMENT=(reject mag < median - 4*MAD) to remove background-star crossings.
COMMENT=Family: Beltwide. Adopted rotation period 12.262 h (2P),
COMMENT=house convention: amplitude-first (amp>0.40 mag) + asymmetry-override
COMMENT=doubling, adversarially verified against raw photometry. status=CONFIRMED.
COMMENT=Note: confirms Cellino+2024/DurechHanus2023 12.26h
COMMENT=OBJECTNAME defaults to the bare object number: no local provisional-
COMMENT=designation table was available for this family; verify/replace before
COMMENT=the manual alcdef.org upload if a proper designation is known.
COMMENT=Associated second MPB paper is in preparation (not yet submitted);
COMMENT=this export is prep-only.
